title: Gluten-Free Delightful Stovetop Treat
description: A simple and delicious recipe made with just a few ingredients, perfect for a quick snack or dessert.
instructions: In a small saucepan, melt 1/4 cup of butter over low heat.
Add 1 tsp of salted to the melted butter and stir until combined.
Gradually add 1 cup of delight to the butter mixture, stirring constantly.
Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens and turns golden brown.
Remove from heat and serve warm.
